10.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Valves - BIKE24
10.extractionRationale: Retail price of 20.16 EUR found directly stated for the CoreCap product (BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166) on the BIKE24 German retail website. This is a single price point extracted from the product listing.

27.evidenceText: Four distinct CoreCap product URLs found: p1993582 (BTI-165 Kupfer), p1993584 (BTI-165 violett), p1993547 (BTI-166 60mm), p1993546 (BTI-166 40mm)
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs from BIKE24.de for CoreCap valves. Excluded the brand landing page (https://www.bike24.de/marken/bbb) as it is not a specific product listing. Each of the four product URLs represents a distinct listing for different valve variants or specifications.

30.evidenceText: Reviewed all 5 product listings on BIKE24 for Schwalbe Clik Valve products. None contain stock status indicators such as 'out of stock', 'currently unavailable', 'nicht verfügbar', or 'ausverkauft'.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status information is completely absent from all 5 sources. The listings contain only product descriptions, specifications, and pricing. No availability or stock-related terminology could be found in any of the provided content.

56.evidenceText: The provided sources discuss the Clik Valve technology and mention some tube references, but do not explicitly enumerate a count of distinct inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface. Source 3 references tube model 19L but does not confirm Clik Valve usage. Source 4 lists valve components, not tubes.
56.extractionRationale: The evidence does not provide an explicit count or comprehensive listing of distinct Schwalbe inner tube models/SKUs that use the Clik valve interface. While the sources discuss Clik Valve and mention some tube products, they do not definitively state which specific tube models use this interface or provide a complete enumeration needed to count them.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum rose to 3467.02 USD/T on April 8, 2026, up 0.07% from the previous day.
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the current spot price of 3467.02 USD/T directly from Trading Economics, which represents the most recent and globally applicable aluminum spot price data. Source 1 appears to reference premium prices rather than spot prices.
